_meta.purpose: 검증된 헬라어/히브리어 핵심 단어 카탈로그. 본 스킬이 원어 분석을 할 때 본 카탈로그의 음역·기본 의미·BDAG/BDB/HALOT 정의를 그대로 사용한다. 카탈로그에 없는 단어는 *'표준 어휘사전 직접 확인 권장'*으로 우회 또는 BDAG/HALOT 직접 인용으로만 사용.

χάρις.BDAG_summary: (1) practical application of goodwill, favor; (2) state of being kindly disposed; (3) gift, benefaction; (4) gratitude

πίστις.BDAG_summary: (1) state of being someone in whom confidence can be placed, faithfulness; (2) state of believing on the basis of reliability, trust; (3) that which is believed, body of faith/belief/teaching

ἀγάπη.BDAG_summary: (1) the quality of warm regard for and interest in another, love; (2) a common meal eaten in connection with worship
ἀγάπη.WARNING: 신약 헬라어에서 ἀγάπη와 φιλέω가 *항상* 구분된 의미를 갖는다는 가정은 과장된 어원학. 요한복음에서 두 단어 상호교환 사용 (요 5:20, 11:3,5,36). D.A. Carson Exegetical Fallacies 표준 비판.

φιλέω.basic_meaning: to love, to have affection for, to kiss
φιλέω.BDAG_summary: (1) to have a special interest in someone, have affection for, like; (2) to kiss
φιλέω.WARNING: ἀγαπάω와의 상호교환 사용 다수. 단어 구분으로 의미 만들기 금지.

λόγος.BDAG_summary: (1) communication of thought, word; (2) computation, reckoning; (3) the personalized expression of God's plan (요 1:1)

σώζω.BDAG_summary: (1) to preserve or rescue from natural dangers and afflictions; (2) to save or preserve from transcendent danger or destruction
σώζω.morphology_notes: σεσῳσμένοι (sesōsmenoi, 엡 2:8) = 완료수동분사 nom pl masc

ποίημα.basic_meaning: that which is made, work, workmanship
ποίημα.BDAG_summary: that which is made by someone, work, what is made

δικαιοσύνη.BDAG_summary: (1) the quality, state, or practice of judicial responsibility w. focus on fairness, justice; (2) quality or state of juridical correctness with focus on redemptive action; (3) the quality or characteristic of upright behavior, uprightness

μετανοέω.basic_meaning: to change one's mind, to repent
μετανοέω.BDAG_summary: (1) change one's mind; (2) feel remorse, repent, be converted

μακάριος.BDAG_summary: pert. to being especially favored, blessed, fortunate, happy
μακάριος.LXX_correspondence: 히브리어 אַשְׁרֵי (ashre, 시 1:1 등)의 70인역 표준 번역

καρπός.BDAG_summary: (1) the edible product of plants; (2) result or outcome
καρπός.morphology_notes: 갈 5:22 단수 καρπός (vs ἔργα 복수, 5:19) — 학계 다수 강조점

λαῖλαψ.BDAG_summary: a violent storm whirling about, hurricane, whirlwind, fierce gust of wind

φιμόω.morphology_notes: 막 4:39 πεφίμωσο = 완료수동명령 2sg (Wallace, Greek Grammar Beyond the Basics)

παρακαλέω.basic_meaning: to call to one's side, urge, exhort, comfort
παρακαλέω.BDAG_summary: (1) call to one's side; (2) urge, exhort; (3) request, implore; (4) comfort, encourage; (5) try to console

θυσία.BDAG_summary: (1) the act of offering; (2) that which is offered as a sacrifice

λογικός.BDAG_summary: pert. to being carefully thought through, thoughtful; pert. to being rational/spiritual
λογικός.interpretation_debate: 롬 12:1 λογικὴν 번역 학계 논쟁 — 영적/이성적/합당한. Moo(NICNT), Cranfield(ICC) 모두 양면 의미 인정.

μεταμορφόω.BDAG_summary: to change in a manner visible to others, be transfigured / transformed

ἐγὼ εἰμί.WARNING: 요한복음 '나는 ~다' 7가지 한정은 임의 분류. 서술형 ego eimi가 4:26, 8:24,28,58, 13:19, 18:5 등 다수 추가. 7=완전수 의미 부여 곡해.

ὅμοιον.BDAG_summary: pert. to being similar in kind

ἀρχή.BDAG_summary: (1) the commencement of something as an action, process, or state of being, beginning; (2) a power or authority, ruler

חֶסֶד.BDB_HALOT_summary: loyal love, kindness, especially within covenant context
חֶסֶד.scholarly_note: Nelson Glueck 1927년 박사논문 (Das Wort hesed im alttestamentlichen Sprachgebrauche) 이후 *언약적 신실한 사랑*으로 학계 표준 정의.

צַלְמָוֶת.BDB_HALOT_summary: traditional reading: 'shadow of death' (tsel + maveth); modern alternative: 'deep darkness' (single root tslmt)
צַלְמָוֶת.etymology_debate: 전통적 tsel+mavet (그늘+죽음) vs 단일어원 tsalmut (깊은 어둠). NRSV·ESV *darkest valley*로 후자 채택. 학계 양쪽 견해 모두 정통.

אַשְׁרֵי.BDB_HALOT_summary: construct plural exclamation: 'O the happinesses of'

נָסָה.BDB_HALOT_summary: to test, try, prove (often of God testing humans)

יָחִיד.LXX_correspondence: 70인역에서 ἀγαπητός (agapētos, 사랑하는)로 번역 — 막 1:11, 9:7 의도적 평행

עָקַד.BDB_HALOT_summary: to bind (especially of binding for sacrifice)

יְהוָה יִרְאֶה.BDB_HALOT_summary: place name in Gen 22:14, from root ra'ah (see); play on 'YHWH sees and provides'

_usage_protocol.rule_1: 본 카탈로그에 *있는* 단어를 인용할 때는 카탈로그의 음역·의미·BDAG/HALOT 요약을 그대로 사용한다.
_usage_protocol.rule_2: 본 카탈로그에 *없는* 단어를 인용할 때는 'BDAG/HALOT 직접 확인 권장' 명시하고 신중하게.
_usage_protocol.rule_3: WARNING 표시가 있는 단어는 그 경고를 반드시 응답에 반영한다 (예: ἀγάπη·φιλέω 구분 곡해).
_usage_protocol.rule_4: morphology_notes는 Wallace Greek Grammar 표준 문법 분석. 임의 변형 금지.
_usage_protocol.rule_5: verified_passages에 있는 본문에 한해 그 단어 사용을 단정. 그 외 본문은 *해당 본문에서도 사용되는지* 별도 확인 필요.
